testcase.classname: CatalogService discoverFromLocation should discover and register a component

testcase.classname: CatalogService registerYaml should register a component from valid YAML

testcase.classname: CatalogService create should create a component with dependencies
testcase.name: CatalogService create should create a component with dependencies

testcase.classname: CatalogService findAll should return all components with relations
testcase.name: CatalogService findAll should return all components with relations

testcase.name: CatalogService findOne should return a component by ID with relations

testcase.classname: DocumentationService findAll should return all entries
testcase.name: DocumentationService findAll should return all entries

testcase.classname: DocumentationService findOne should return documentation by ID
testcase.name: DocumentationService findOne should return documentation by ID

testcase.classname: DocumentationService findOne should throw NotFoundException for unknown ID
testcase.name: DocumentationService findOne should throw NotFoundException for unknown ID

testcase.classname: AuthService register should register a user
testcase.name: AuthService register should register a user

testcase.classname: AuthService register should throw ConflictException if user exists
testcase.name: AuthService register should throw ConflictException if user exists

testcase.classname: AuthService login should login with valid credentials
testcase.name: AuthService login should login with valid credentials

testcase.classname: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException for invalid password
testcase.name: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException for invalid password

testcase.classname: AppController getHealth should return status ok
